lesson.title: 今日论文学习：A Useful Paper

sections.title: 研究问题
sections.body: 这篇内容的学习入口来自 Claim Ledger [claim:lesson:001]：The abstract reports an evidence-grounded AI system

sections.title: 关键证据
sections.body: 证据来自 Claim Ledger [claim:lesson:001]：The abstract reports an evidence-grounded AI system；证据来自 Claim Ledger [claim:lesson:002]：The paper is an arXiv preprint。
